title: Repurposed Structures - Savage & Ravage Compat
description: Transforms RS outposts to Savage and Ravage's style
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Savage & Ravage. All RS outposts will be transformed into Savage and Ravage's styled outposts and will have their Gloomy Tiles too.

- Savage & Ravage mod can be obtained from here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/savage-and-ravage

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sDzgzRzB/images/521c4216e9d64c0ddf427314a735449eb44d6313.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sDzgzRzB/images/521c4216e9d64c0ddf427314a735449eb44d6313.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
